popup.loading.title: Loading…
popup.loading.body: One moment — picking up the latest status.
popup.idle.label: No target yet
popup.monitoring.lookAgain: No slots. I'll look again in {time}.
popup.slotFound.evidenceLabel: Why I think there's a slot
popup.loggedOut.title: Session expired
popup.loggedOut.body: Your TLScontact session expired — {emph}. Sign back in and I'll pick up where I left off.
popup.loggedOut.bodyEmph: I can't watch a logged-out page
popup.loggedOut.note: Monitoring paused until I see a fresh session.
popup.cloudflare.title: Security check needed
popup.cloudflare.body: Cloudflare is asking you to prove you're human. That's normal — {emph}, then I'll resume polling.
popup.cloudflare.whyNot: Why I'm not solving it for you
popup.cloudflare.whyNotBody: Auto-solving CAPTCHAs is the fastest way to get an account banned. I won't do it. You always solve, I always wait.
popup.paused.title: Paused
popup.paused.label: Status
popup.paused.sub: Nothing is being checked. Last status: no slots, {time}.
popup.unknown.title: Help me read this page
popup.unknown.body: The page changed shape. {emph} and tell me what you see — I'll learn and stop asking.
popup.unknown.submit: Submit hash to help improve detection
popup.unknown.context: Visa Master watches your TLScontact appointment-booking page for slot openings. This page isn't one I recognize — likely a different step of the workflow.
popup.unknown.classifyLabel: Already on the right page? Tell me what you see and I'll learn it:
popup.idle.howItWorks: Visa Master only watches when you're on a TLScontact appointment-booking page. Open one and I'll start monitoring automatically.
popup.upline.headline: Tired of racing for slots?
popup.upline.sub: £19 only when we successfully book — fully refundable 24h
popup.firstRun.title: Getting started
popup.firstRun.tip1: Pin Visa Master to your toolbar — click the puzzle (⊞) icon then the pin.
popup.firstRun.tip2: Keep the TLScontact tab on your current desktop — don't minimise or switch Spaces.
popup.firstRun.tip3: Enable phone alerts in Settings → Telegram to get notified anywhere.
popup.wrongPage.title: Wrong page
popup.wrongPage.headline: But this isn't the booking page
popup.wrongPage.body: Visa Master watches the {booking} page on TLScontact for slot openings. The current tab is a different step in the application flow — open the booking page to start monitoring.
popup.wrongPage.footnote: We won't watch the wrong page — open the booking step and we'll pick it up automatically.
contact.title: Talk to Torly AI
welcome.hl.watch.title: Watches 24/7
welcome.hl.watch.sub: Polls TLScontact every 2–15 minutes around the clock — slot drops are caught within minutes.
welcome.hl.alert.title: Desktop + phone
welcome.hl.alert.sub: Local desktop notification by default. Optional Telegram pings to your phone when you step away from the laptop.
welcome.hl.local.title: 100% local
welcome.hl.local.sub: No servers. No telemetry. Your TLScontact session and cookies never leave your browser.
welcome.hl.free.title: Free & open source
welcome.hl.free.sub: MIT licensed. Every line of code running on your machine is in the public GitHub repo — audit it yourself.
welcome.h1.after: page so you don't have to.
welcome.lede: I'm a small, polite background process. I refresh your appointment booking page on a steady cadence and tap you on the shoulder the moment a slot appears — nothing more.
welcome.yes.1: Refresh your TLScontact booking page on a polite cadence — every 2–15 minutes, defaulting to four.
welcome.yes.2: Notify you the instant a slot opens, via desktop alert and an optional chime.
welcome.yes.3: Run entirely inside your browser. Your session never leaves this computer.
welcome.yes.4: Show my work — every detection comes with the evidence I used.
welcome.no.h: What the Free tier won't do
welcome.no.1: Read your passport number, name, or any form field on the page.
welcome.no.2: Book the slot for you. (Premium can — see the tier section above.)
welcome.no.3: Solve Cloudflare captchas. I'll politely ask you to.
welcome.no.4: Send your data to a server. (Premium has a small licensing API — see above.)
welcome.disclaim: TLScontact's terms of service may classify automation as prohibited. I keep polling polite to minimise risk, but you use this at your own risk. I'm open source — verify what I do at
welcome.tiers.sub: You're installing the Free tier — it watches your TLScontact page and notifies you the moment a slot opens. Premium adds auto-booking: when a slot fits your travel window, we click through the booking for you and Stripe charges £19 only after the booking is confirmed.
welcome.tiers.free.name: Free
welcome.tiers.free.bullet.1: Watches your TLS booking page on a polite cadence.
welcome.tiers.free.bullet.2: Desktop + Telegram alert the moment a slot opens.
welcome.tiers.free.bullet.3: You book the slot yourself in your own tab.
welcome.tiers.free.bullet.4: Local-only. No servers. No credentials touched.
welcome.tiers.premium.name: Premium
welcome.tiers.premium.bullet.2: Auto-books the slot when one fits your window.
welcome.tiers.premium.bullet.3: Auto-login when TLS expires your session.
welcome.tiers.premium.bullet.4: £0 now. £19 only if we actually book a slot.
settings.title: Settings
settings.toc.label: On this page
settings.support.intro: Tell us what's wrong. We typically reply within 24 hours on weekdays — continue the conversation in your email.
settings.support.placeholder: What happened? Steps you tried, what you expected vs what you saw.
settings.support.attachDebug.hint: Extension version, install ID, current locale, user agent. No browsing history or credentials.
settings.support.screenshot.hint: Captures whatever is in your active tab right now.
settings.support.screenshot.disabled: Screenshot attachments are coming soon (need backend endpoint).
settings.support.privacy: Stored on our private servers and auto-deleted after 90 days. Only the Visa Master support team can view it.
settings.support.replyNote: We'll email you a copy at your reply address — reply to that email to continue the conversation.
settings.target.none: No target detected — open a TLScontact page in any tab.
settings.detection.monthCyclingSub: Experimental — when no slots are visible in the current month, click the next month tab to scan it too. Off by default to keep the extension a passive scanner.
settings.notif.title: Change tab title and favicon
settings.notif.focus: Auto-focus the TLS tab on detection
settings.tg.enable: Send slot alerts to my phone via Telegram
settings.tg.enableSub: Free, encrypted, takes ~2 minutes to set up. Phone keeps notifications even when this laptop is asleep.
settings.tg.intro: 5 steps, around 2 minutes. Follow them in order — each one builds on the previous.
settings.tg.alsoBlockers: Also alert me on Cloudflare check / logged-out
settings.tg.alsoMonitoring: Ping me when monitoring starts or resumes
settings.tg.alsoMonitoringSub: A short confirmation after the extension begins watching — useful so you know it's running before you close the laptop.
settings.tg.step.install.title: Install Telegram on your phone
settings.tg.step.install.body: Telegram is a free messaging app. If you don't already have it, install it on your phone — that's where slot alerts will arrive.
settings.tg.step.install.signin: After installing, sign in with your phone number, then come back here.
settings.tg.step.bot.title: Create your bot in Telegram
settings.tg.step.bot.body: In Telegram, open the chat with @BotFather, send /newbot, and follow the prompts. BotFather will reply with a long bot token — copy it (long-press → Copy).
settings.tg.step.token.title: Paste the bot token here
settings.tg.step.token.body: Paste the raw token. No quotes, no angle brackets, no spaces.
settings.tg.step.token.tipTitle: Common mistake — don't include angle brackets
settings.tg.step.token.urlGoodLabel: Correct — your real token, no brackets:
settings.tg.step.token.urlBadLabel: Wrong — angle brackets are placeholders, not part of the URL:
settings.tg.step.token.okHint: After you message your bot (Step 4), click below — it opens your Chat ID page with your real token already filled in.
settings.tg.step.start.title: Open your new bot and say hi
settings.tg.step.start.body: BotFather's reply contains a link to your bot (looks like t.me/your_bot_name). Open it in Telegram, tap Start, or send any message. This is what creates the chat — without it, the next step returns nothing.
settings.tg.step.chatid.title: Get your Chat ID and send a test
settings.tg.step.chatid.body: Click below — a JSON page opens in a new tab. Find chat.id and copy the number.
settings.tg.step.chatid.chatIdHint: Numeric — paste the chat.id from the JSON page above.
settings.tg.step.chatid.findChatIdDisabl: Paste your bot token in Step 3 first.
settings.tg.step.chatid.responseLabel: What you'll see — copy the chat.id number:
settings.tg.preview.title: What you'll receive on your phone
settings.tg.preview.intro: Once you're set up, Visa Master pushes these alerts to your Telegram bot.
settings.tg.preview.slotBody:
🚨 Slot found — Manchester
FR visa · gbMNC2fr
15:21:08 UTC

Switch to your TLScontact tab and book now.
settings.tg.preview.cfLabel: Cloudflare check needed — only if you turn on the toggle above
settings.tg.preview.cfBody:
⚠️ Cloudflare check needed
Manchester · 15:21:08 UTC

Open the TLS tab and complete the check. Monitoring is paused.
settings.tg.preview.loLabel: Session expired — only if you turn on the toggle above
settings.tg.preview.loBody:
⚠️ TLScontact session expired
Manchester · 15:21:08 UTC

Sign back in to resume monitoring.
settings.tg.preview.monLabel: Monitoring started — only if you turn on the toggle above
settings.tg.preview.monBody:
✅ Monitoring started — Manchester
FR visa · gbMNC2fr
15:21:08 UTC

I'll ping you the moment a slot opens.
settings.tg.preview.privacyIncludes: Each message contains: centre name, country code (e.g. FR), subject code (e.g. gbMNC2fr), and a timestamp.
settings.tg.preview.privacyExcludes: Never sent to Telegram: your TLScontact login, cookies, passport number, URLs, or any form data on the page.
settings.lang.note: Detection language must match TLScontact account setting.
settings.privacy.telemetrySub: Sent: poll counts, error counts. Never: URLs, PII.
settings.about.developerSub: Torly AI builds visa-application AI assistants — including a UK Innovator Founder visa AI-assistant and this Schengen Visa Master agent. Open source so you can audit what runs on your machine.
settings.update.errorPermission: Permission to reach GitHub is required for the version check. Click again to allow.
settings.update.errorNetwork: Couldn't reach GitHub. Check your connection and try again.
settings.update.help: Visa Master ships via GitHub Releases — updates aren't automatic. Click above to compare your installed version with the latest published release.
lang.en.label: English
lang.zh.label: 中文
premium.common.handsOff.title: Hands off the TLS tab
premium.preflight.title: Before you start
premium.preflight.pin.body: Right-click → Pin tab. It survives restarts.
premium.preflight.power.body: Monitoring pauses when the computer sleeps.
premium.setupCredentials.title: Centre & login
premium.setupCredentials.centre.label: Visa centre
premium.setupCredentials.email.label: TLScontact email
premium.setupCredentials.password.label: TLScontact password
premium.setupCredentials.trust.title: Stored on your machine
premium.setupCredentials.trust.body: Email + password live in encrypted Chrome storage (AES-GCM). They never leave your browser; our servers never see them.
premium.setupSigningIn.title: Signing you in…
premium.setupSigningIn.body: Driving the TLScontact tab — this takes 8–12 seconds.
premium.setupSigningIn.handsOff.body: Visa Master is driving it right now. Don't click, type, or close it until setup finishes.
premium.setupBookingWindow.title: When are you travelling?
premium.setupBookingWindow.sub: We'll book the earliest slot that leaves enough buffer for your visa to process.
premium.setupBookingWindow.processingDay: Most visas finish in ~14 days; the extra week is buffer.
premium.setupBookingWindow.primeTime.lab: Include Prime Time and Premium slots
premium.setupBookingWindow.primeTime.sub: TLS charges ~£60 surcharge. Off by default.
premium.setupReady.title: Ready to activate
premium.setupReady.trust.title: Setup complete · {centre}
premium.setupReady.trust.body: Group {groupId}. £0 now — we only charge £19 if we actually book.
premium.setupReady.work.h: From here, we do the work
premium.setupReady.work.watch.body: We watch TLS and grab the first fitting slot.
premium.setupReady.work.pay.body: pay TLS's visa fee on their site.
premium.setupReady.cta: Activate — £0 now, £19 only on a booking
premium.setupReady.disclaim: Stripe saves your card so we can charge £19 if we book — nothing taken today.
premium.verificationGate.title: Quick check needed
premium.verificationGate.body: TLScontact is showing a verification gate. Wait for it to clear (usually 20–30 seconds), then tap Continue.
premium.verificationGate.paused.title: Setup paused
premium.verificationGate.paused.body: We won't auto-solve captchas — that gets accounts banned.
premium.setupFailedRetry.title: Setup couldn't finish
premium.setupFailedRetry.body.before: We couldn't complete sign-in on the first pass. TLScontact often asks for a fresh login when an existing session is cached —
premium.setupFailedStale.title: Manual logout needed
premium.setupFailedStale.body: TLScontact already has someone signed in on this browser, and our auto-logout couldn't clear it.
premium.setupFailedStale.do.before: Open the TLS tab → click the
premium.active.title: Watching for slots
premium.active.recent.waiting: Waiting for any appointment slots available.
premium.active.keepScanning.b1: Leave the dedicated TLS window alone — pinned tab, no extras.
premium.active.keepScanning.b2: Keep that window on your current desktop (not minimized, not on another Space).
premium.active.keepScanning.b3: Keep your laptop plugged in — monitoring pauses if the device sleeps.
premium.options.tier.label: PREMIUM ACTIVE
premium.options.window.processingDays.hi: Default 21. Most visas finish in ~14 days; the extra week is a buffer for slower-than-usual processing. Lower this only if you've confirmed a faster turnaround for your visa type.
premium.options.window.minDaysNotice.hin: Don't book anything sooner than this many days from today. Default 0 — we accept the earliest appointment we can find.
premium.options.groupId.label: Group ID (8 digits)
premium.options.groupId.hint: The 8-digit number that appears in your TLScontact appointment URL (e.g. /26091062/).
premium.options.centre.hint: To change the centre, reset setup from the main tab.
premium.bookingInProgress.handsOff.body: Visa Master is driving the booking right now. Don't click or close the TLS tab.
premium.booked.captured.title: £19 captured · receipt emailed
premium.booked.captured.body: Receipt sent to your Stripe email.
premium.booked.payTls.h: ⏰ One step left — pay TLS within 30 min
premium.booked.refundNote: If TLS cancels this slot within 24 h, we'll refund £19.
premium.booked.review.title: Helped you book?
premium.booked.review.body: A quick review is how we reach the next person stuck refreshing TLS — and it takes less than a minute.
premium.booked.review.cta: Leave a review on the Chrome Web Store
premium.bookingFailed.title: Booking attempt failed
premium.bookingFailed.charged.title: £0 charged
premium.bookingFailed.charged.body: Back to scanning for the next slot.
premium.bookingFailed.reason.default: Slot was taken before we could confirm the booking.
premium.refund.title: Refund £19?
premium.refund.body: We charged £19 for the booking. If TLS cancelled or refused this slot, we'll refund in full and resume scanning.
premium.refund.reason.docs: TLS asked for documents I don't have yet
premium.refund.note: Refunds take 5–10 business days to appear on your card.
premium.intro.banner.sent: ✓ Stripe Checkout opened in a new tab. Enter your card to put it on file — £0 charged today.
premium.intro.banner.error: Couldn't reach the checkout server. Check your connection and try again.
premium.intro.hero.sub.before: Premium is the auto-book tier. Same codebase, same trust posture as the free extension —
premium.intro.hero.sub.after: . No subscription. No charge unless we land you a slot.
premium.intro.compare.eyebrow: Free or Premium · pick what fits
premium.intro.compare.title.before: Two ways to use Visa Master.
premium.intro.compare.lede: Free is its own complete product. Premium is the same extension with auto-book and auto-login added on. Switch on, switch off — your data and your settings stay put.
premium.intro.compare.free.b1: Detect slots on a polite 2–15 min cadence
premium.intro.compare.free.b4: Runs entirely in your browser. No server.
premium.intro.compare.free.b5: You book manually — race the form yourself
premium.intro.compare.free.b6: You re-login each time TLS expires the session
premium.intro.compare.premium.b1: Everything in Free, identical detection engine
premium.intro.compare.premium.b3: Auto-login when TLS expires your session
premium.intro.compare.premium.b4: Email receipt + Telegram alert on book
premium.intro.compare.premium.b6.after: if TLS voids the slot within 24 h
premium.intro.compare.note.after: is £19.99 per fortnight regardless of outcome.
premium.intro.how.lede: You set the window, we do the racing. The flow below is verbatim what the popup walks you through — no hidden steps, no upsells once you're inside.
premium.intro.how.s1.d: Just like Free — you log in normally. Your session lives in your browser; we never see your TLS password leave the machine.
premium.intro.how.s2.d.after: Every poll runs in your Chrome.
premium.intro.how.s3.d: Your travel date, processing-day buffer, and Prime Time preference define what counts. First match wins.
premium.intro.how.s4.d: Card on file, captured only after TLS confirms the appointment. No subscription, no holds, no surprises.
premium.intro.how.s5.d: Final step on you — TLS's own fee is paid on their site, not by us. We hand off as soon as the slot is confirmed.
premium.intro.disclose.t: TLScontact does not permit automated interactions.
premium.intro.disclose.b.before: Premium uses automation against TLS's terms of service. We disclose this up-front so you can decide.
premium.intro.disclose.b.after: we throttle politely, mimic human timing, and pause on the first sign of friction. If TLS locks your account anyway, Premium pauses and you owe nothing for any slot that wasn't booked. Free tier never touches automation — only Premium does.
premium.intro.faq.lede: If a question is missing, ask us on WeChat or WhatsApp and we'll answer in public.
premium.intro.faq.q1.q: What if you never find me a slot?
premium.intro.faq.q1.a.after: You owe nothing — we keep scanning until you cancel or successfully book.
premium.intro.faq.q2.a.before: Yes — from the extension popup, one tap. We stop scanning immediately.
premium.intro.faq.q2.a.emph: No charges happen unless we've already booked a slot for you.
premium.intro.faq.q3.q: What if a slot opens but TLS doesn't confirm the booking?
premium.intro.faq.q3.a.after: the appointment. Failed attempts are free.
premium.intro.faq.q4.q: What if TLS cancels the slot you booked?
premium.intro.faq.q4.a.before: We refund the £19 in full if TLS voids the booking
premium.intro.faq.q4.a.after: of confirmation. After that, the slot is yours and the fee stands.
premium.intro.faq.q5.q: What if my TLScontact account gets locked?
premium.intro.faq.q5.a.before: Premium pauses. We won't keep trying.
premium.intro.faq.q5.a.emph: If we haven't booked, you owe nothing.
premium.intro.faq.q5.a.after: If we already booked, the fee stands — that slot is real.
premium.intro.faq.q6.q: Where is my card stored? Where are my TLS credentials?
premium.intro.faq.q6.a: Card on Stripe's PCI-compliant vault — we never see the number, only a customer ID. TLS email + password live in chrome.storage.local, AES-GCM encrypted by src/shared/crypto.ts. Both can be wiped from Options.
premium.intro.final.meta: £19 only if we book · cancel any time · refund if TLS voids
premium.intro.footer: © 2026 Torly AI Ltd · Not affiliated with TLScontact, the French government, or any consulate. Visa Master is open source · MIT licensed. Premium adds Stripe + a small licensing API; everything else is identical to Free.
